title: Cobblemon Obsidian
description:
A glorious, feature-rich and immersive Cobblemon adventure awaits you and your friends on our server!

Works in singleplayer.
body:
The best way to play Cobblemon - handcrafted by us!

The pack includes Cobblemon and basically every submod you could ever want for it. This includes rideable Pokémon, Gym badges, functional TMs, Mega Evolutions tons of QoL and so much more. 
There are also a small amount of fluffy sidemods such as Handcrafted, Farmer's Delight and William Wyther's that enhance the experience but do not distract from the main attraction.

Our server features a small, chill community to make friends in as well as weekly events and custom world generation.

This pack was crafted for play on our server and includes functions for that. However, this pack should work just fine in singleplayer too.

Click on "Report issues" on the side bar to get to the application form.
